## Approval Count Reconciliation

This document tracks two separate approval registers that must not be conflated:

| Register | Scope | Approved | Rejected | Deferred | Pending |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| **PA approval register** (PA items only) | PA-INDEX-01 | **1** | 0 | 0 | 0 |
| **BA approval register** (BA-01 through BA-19 only) | Business and executive approvals | **0** | 0 | 0 | **19** |
| **Combined register** (all 20 items) | PA + BA combined | **1** | 0 | 0 | **19** |

**Reading the counts:**
- If a report says "approved: 1 / pending: 19" — it is using the **combined register** (20 items total: PA-INDEX-01 + BA-01 through BA-19).
- If a report says "approved: 0 / pending: 19" for BA items — it is using the **BA-only register** (19 items).
- Both counts are correct within their own scope. PA-INDEX-01 is approved. No BA item is approved.

## Naming Convention

All index names use **underscore naming only**, following the pattern:

```
idx_{entity_snake_case}_{field1}_{field2}_{field3}
```

Example: `idx_master_general_agent_code_status`

Base44 entity names are PascalCase. The DBA should map them to the underlying table names as they exist in the managed database. If the platform uses the entity name directly as the table name (common in Base44), use the snake_case equivalent. Confirm table name mapping with your Base44 platform infrastructure contact if uncertain.

```
Reason:  Requires MasterGeneralAgentUser record count > 0
         after RE-04 MasterGroup seeding completes.
         Separate authorization required before creation.
DO NOT CREATE THIS INDEX as part of this execution batch.
```

## The 29 Approved Indexes — Full DBA Execution Specification

---

### Index #1

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Index number | 1 |
| Entity / table | MasterGeneralAgent |
| Fields / columns | code, status |
| Purpose | Unique MGA code enforcement; status filter for scoped MGA lookups |
| Unique or non-unique | **Non-unique** (code should have a separate unique constraint; this index supports filter queries) |
| Recommended index name | `idx_master_general_agent_code_status` |
| Required before Phase 4B | **YES** |
| Performance purpose | Eliminates full-table scan on MGA code lookup and status filtering during backfill and runtime |
| Risk if not created | Full-table scan on every MGA code lookup during Phase 4B backfill and runtime scopeGate |

**DDL:**
```sql
CREATE INDEX idx_master_general_agent_code_status
  ON "MasterGeneralAgent" (code, status);
```

**Validation query:**
```sql
EXPLAIN SELECT * FROM "MasterGeneralAgent" WHERE code = 'NBG' AND status = 'active';
-- Expected: Index Scan using idx_master_general_agent_code_status
```

**Rollback / drop instruction:**
```sql
DROP INDEX IF EXISTS idx_master_general_agent_code_status;
```

| Purpose | Discriminated manual listing by MGA scope and type |
| Unique or non-unique | Non-unique |
| Recommended index name | `idx_user_manual_mga_id_scope_type` |
| Required before Phase 4B | **YES** |
| Performance purpose | Enables fast manual listing without scope bleed across MGAs |
| Risk if not created | Scope bleed risk on manual queries |

**DDL:**
```sql
CREATE INDEX idx_user_manual_mga_id_scope_type
  ON "UserManual" (master_general_agent_id, scope_type);
```

**Validation query:**
```sql
EXPLAIN SELECT * FROM "UserManual"
  WHERE master_general_agent_id = '<id>' AND scope_type = 'mga';
-- Expected: Index Scan using idx_user_manual_mga_id_scope_type
```

**Rollback:**
```sql
DROP INDEX IF EXISTS idx_user_manual_mga_id_scope_type;
```

## After DBA Execution — Report Back to Base44

When all 29 indexes have been created and validated, return to Base44 and send:

> "Indexes have been created by our DBA."

Optionally include:
- Which indexes were created successfully
- Which (if any) failed and why
- Any query plan validation results

Base44 will then:
1. Mark B4B-06 as **FULLY RESOLVED**
2. Update all Phase 4A reports
3. Document the confirmed creation timestamp
4. Present updated blocker status
